name: keigakomi_inline_forward

meta.note: [provenance:hand-derived §6.7 + AOZORA-ANNOTATION 2026-06-17] The inline forward-reference 罫囲み ［＃「X」は罫囲み］ (https://www.aozora.gr.jp/annotation/etc.html) boxes a span, the span-level counterpart of the block 罫囲み container. Per §7.5 it consumes the preceding target literal 注意 and yields an emphasis node; §8 renders <span class="aozora-keigakomi-inline">. Offsets computed from the §3 byte model; cross-checked against the reference processor.

source: 注意［＃「注意」は罫囲み］事項。

expected.serialize: 注意［＃「注意」は罫囲み］事項。
